name: NexCampus v2.14.0
changelog: Detailed planet info: discovery, discoverer, composition, surface, escape velocity, albedo, magnetic field, notable features
New Details tab in planet info panel
Higher quality procedural planet textures (200+ speckles, 150+ bands, 20+ large features)
3D rim lighting and sphere shadow effects on planets
All 8 planets + 5 dwarf planets have complete detailed profiles
